  After the fall of Gondolin Tuor with Idril Celebrindal and their son
Earendil the Blessed went to the sea, where Tuor built a great ship and with
his wife set sail into sunset and the West. Tuor alone of mortal Men was
numbered among the elder race, and was joined with the Noldor, whom he loved.
  Now he dwells in Valinor, helping Valar to shape Arda and heal its wounds
inflicted by Morgoth.

raw_text:
Porien the Knight of Sadness is a Maia (Cartographer).
 "What do you think is best in me?"
 "In you? I think it's when you sit silently somewhere out of sight."
 "Really?"
 "I don't  know. Seriously, you  can find out  yourself what is  best in
you, because this is how you meet what you are in  love  with.  What did you
feel thinking about that guy who waved? "
 "Sadness."
 "Well  then,  sadness  it is.  That's the  best you have, and  you will
always meet the things you love with sadness.
                                    Victor Pelevin "Hermit and Sixfinger"
notes: query_name=porien | display_name=Porien the Knight of Sadness | epithet_or_title=the Knight of Sadness | role=Cartographer
